strings.schematron.title: High Value Datasets (v3.0.0)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.1: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Distribution (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.10: A statement that specifies rights associated with the Distribution. (dct:rights)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.11: A licence under which the Distribution is made available. (dct:license)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.12: A licence under which the Distribution is made available. (dct:license)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.13: The applicable legislation must be set to the HVD IR ELI. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.14: A Dataset that is part of the Catalogue. (dcat:dataset)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.15: A Catalogue Record that is part of the Catalogue (dcat:record)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.16: A Catalogue Record that is part of the Catalogue (dcat:record)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.17: A Dataset that is part of the Catalogue. (dcat:dataset)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.18: A site or end-point (Data Service) that is listed in the Catalogue. (dcat:service)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.19: A site or end-point (Data Service) that is listed in the Catalogue. (dcat:service)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.2: An established schema to which the described Distribution conforms. (dct:conformsTo)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.20: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset Series. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.21: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset Series. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.22: The HVD category to which this Dataset belongs. (dcat-ap:hvdCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.23: The HVD category to which this Dataset belongs. (dcat-ap:hvdCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.24: The applicable legislation must be set to the HVD IR ELI. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.25: A link to the Dataset, Data service or Catalog described in the record. (foaf:primaryTopic)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.26: A link to the Dataset, Data service or Catalog described in the record. (foaf:primaryTopic)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.27: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Data Service. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.28: This property refers to a collection of data that this data service can distribute. (dcat:servesDataset)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.29: The HVD category to which this Data Service belongs. (dcat-ap:hvdCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.3: A data service that gives access to the distribution of the dataset (dcat:accessService)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.30: The root location or primary endpoint of the service (an IRI). (dcat:endpointURL)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.31: The HVD category to which this Data Service belongs. (dcat-ap:hvdCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.32: A description of the services available via the end-points, including their operations, parameters etc. (dcat:endpointDescription)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.33: A page that provides additional information about the Data Service. (foaf:page)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.34: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Data Service. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.35: Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Data Service. (dcat:contactPoint)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.36: A statement that specifies rights associated with the Distribution. (dct:rights)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.37: A page that provides additional information about the Data Service. (foaf:page)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.38: Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Data Service. (dcat:contactPoint)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.39: A statement that specifies rights associated with the Distribution. (dct:rights)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.4: An established schema to which the described Distribution conforms. (dct:conformsTo)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.40: This property refers to a collection of data that this data service can distribute. (dcat:servesDataset)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.41: A licence under which the Data service is made available. (dct:license)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.42: A description of the services available via the end-points, including their operations, parameters etc. (dcat:endpointDescription)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.43: The root location or primary endpoint of the service (an IRI). (dcat:endpointURL)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.44: A licence under which the Data service is made available. (dct:license)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.45: The applicable legislation must be set to the HVD IR ELI. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.46: A email address via which contact can be made. (vcard:hasEmail)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.47: A webpage that either allows to make contact (i.e. a webform) or the information contains how to get into contact. (vcard:hasURL)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.48: A email address via which contact can be made. (vcard:hasEmail)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.49: A webpage that either allows to make contact (i.e. a webform) or the information contains how to get into contact. (vcard:hasURL)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.5: A URL that gives access to a Distribution of the Dataset. (dcat:accessURL)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.50: An implementing rule or other specification. (dct:conformsTo)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.51: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.52: An available Distribution for the Dataset. (dcat:distribution)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.53: A dataset series of which the dataset is part. (dcat:inSeries)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.54: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.55: Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Dataset. (dcat:contactPoint)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.56: A dataset series of which the dataset is part. (dcat:inSeries)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.57: The HVD category to which this Dataset belongs. (dcat-ap:hvdCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.58: The HVD category to which this Dataset belongs. (dcat-ap:hvdCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.59: Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Dataset. (dcat:contactPoint)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.6: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Distribution (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.60: An implementing rule or other specification. (dct:conformsTo)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.61: An available Distribution for the Dataset. (dcat:distribution)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.62: The applicable legislation must be set to the HVD IR ELI. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.7: A data service that gives access to the distribution of the dataset (dcat:accessService)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.8: A statement that specifies rights associated with the Distribution. (dct:rights)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.assert.9: A URL that gives access to a Distribution of the Dataset. (dcat:accessURL)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.1: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Distribution (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.10: A statement that specifies rights associated with the Distribution. (dct:rights)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.11: A licence under which the Distribution is made available. (dct:license)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.12: A licence under which the Distribution is made available. (dct:license)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.13: The applicable legislation must be set to the HVD IR ELI. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.14: A Dataset that is part of the Catalogue. (dcat:dataset)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.15: A Catalogue Record that is part of the Catalogue (dcat:record)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.16: A Catalogue Record that is part of the Catalogue (dcat:record)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.17: A Dataset that is part of the Catalogue. (dcat:dataset)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.18: A site or end-point (Data Service) that is listed in the Catalogue. (dcat:service)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.19: A site or end-point (Data Service) that is listed in the Catalogue. (dcat:service)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.2: An established schema to which the described Distribution conforms. (dct:conformsTo)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.20: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset Series. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.21: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset Series. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.22: The HVD category to which this Dataset belongs. (dcat-ap:hvdCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.23: The HVD category to which this Dataset belongs. (dcat-ap:hvdCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.24: The applicable legislation must be set to the HVD IR ELI. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.25: A link to the Dataset, Data service or Catalog described in the record. (foaf:primaryTopic)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.26: A link to the Dataset, Data service or Catalog described in the record. (foaf:primaryTopic)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.27: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Data Service. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.28: This property refers to a collection of data that this data service can distribute. (dcat:servesDataset)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.29: The HVD category to which this Data Service belongs. (dcat-ap:hvdCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.3: A data service that gives access to the distribution of the dataset (dcat:accessService)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.30: The root location or primary endpoint of the service (an IRI). (dcat:endpointURL)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.31: The HVD category to which this Data Service belongs. (dcat-ap:hvdCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.32: A description of the services available via the end-points, including their operations, parameters etc. (dcat:endpointDescription)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.33: A page that provides additional information about the Data Service. (foaf:page)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.34: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Data Service. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.35: Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Data Service. (dcat:contactPoint)

strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.39: A statement that specifies rights associated with the Distribution. (dct:rights)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.4: An established schema to which the described Distribution conforms. (dct:conformsTo)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.40: This property refers to a collection of data that this data service can distribute. (dcat:servesDataset)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.41: A licence under which the Data service is made available. (dct:license)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.42: A description of the services available via the end-points, including their operations, parameters etc. (dcat:endpointDescription)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.43: The root location or primary endpoint of the service (an IRI). (dcat:endpointURL)

strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.45: The applicable legislation must be set to the HVD IR ELI. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.46: A email address via which contact can be made. (vcard:hasEmail)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.47: A webpage that either allows to make contact (i.e. a webform) or the information contains how to get into contact. (vcard:hasURL)

strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.49: A webpage that either allows to make contact (i.e. a webform) or the information contains how to get into contact. (vcard:hasURL)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.5: A URL that gives access to a Distribution of the Dataset. (dcat:accessURL)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.50: An implementing rule or other specification. (dct:conformsTo)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.51: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.52: An available Distribution for the Dataset. (dcat:distribution)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.53: A dataset series of which the dataset is part. (dcat:inSeries)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.54: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.55: Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Dataset. (dcat:contactPoint)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.56: A dataset series of which the dataset is part. (dcat:inSeries)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.57: The HVD category to which this Dataset belongs. (dcat-ap:hvdCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.58: The HVD category to which this Dataset belongs. (dcat-ap:hvdCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.59: Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Dataset. (dcat:contactPoint)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.6: The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Distribution (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.60: An implementing rule or other specification. (dct:conformsTo)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.61: An available Distribution for the Dataset. (dcat:distribution)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.62: The applicable legislation must be set to the HVD IR ELI. (dcat-ap:applicableLegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.7: A data service that gives access to the distribution of the dataset (dcat:accessService)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.8: A statement that specifies rights associated with the Distribution. (dct:rights)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.report.9: A URL that gives access to a Distribution of the Dataset. (dcat:accessURL)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.1: Applicable legislation - The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Distribution (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Distribution.applicablelegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.10: Rights - A statement that specifies rights associated with the Distribution. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Distribution.rights)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.11: Licence - A licence under which the Distribution is made available. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Distribution.licence)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.12: Licence - A licence under which the Distribution is made available. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Distribution.licence)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.13: The applicable legislation must be set to the HVD IR ELI. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Distribution.applicablelegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.14: Dataset - A Dataset that is part of the Catalogue. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Catalogue.dataset)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.15: Record - A Catalogue Record that is part of the Catalogue (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Catalogue.record)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.16: Record - A Catalogue Record that is part of the Catalogue (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Catalogue.record)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.17: Dataset - A Dataset that is part of the Catalogue. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Catalogue.dataset)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.18: Service - A site or end-point (Data Service) that is listed in the Catalogue. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Catalogue.service)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.19: Service - A site or end-point (Data Service) that is listed in the Catalogue. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Catalogue.service)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.2: Linked schemas - An established schema to which the described Distribution conforms. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Distribution.linkedschemas)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.20: Applicable legislation - The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset Series. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DatasetSeries.applicablelegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.21: Applicable legislation - The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset Series. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DatasetSeries.applicablelegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.22: Hvd category - The HVD category to which this Dataset belongs. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DatasetSeries.HVDCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.23: Hvd category - The HVD category to which this Dataset belongs. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DatasetSeries.HVDCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.24: The applicable legislation must be set to the HVD IR ELI. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DatasetSeries.applicablelegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.25: Primary topic - A link to the Dataset, Data service or Catalog described in the record. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#CatalogueRecord.primarytopic)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.26: Primary topic - A link to the Dataset, Data service or Catalog described in the record. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#CatalogueRecord.primarytopic)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.27: Applicable legislation - The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Data Service. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.applicablelegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.28: Serves dataset - This property refers to a collection of data that this data service can distribute. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.servesdataset)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.29: Hvd category - The HVD category to which this Data Service belongs. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.HVDcategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.3: Access service - A data service that gives access to the distribution of the dataset (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Distribution.accessservice)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.30: Endpoint url - The root location or primary endpoint of the service (an IRI). (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.endpointURL)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.31: Hvd category - The HVD category to which this Data Service belongs. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.HVDcategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.32: Endpoint description - A description of the services available via the end-points, including their operations, parameters etc. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.endpointdescription)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.33: Documentation - A page that provides additional information about the Data Service. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.documentation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.34: Applicable legislation - The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Data Service. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.applicablelegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.35: Contact point - Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Data Service. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.contactpoint)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.36: Rights - A statement that specifies rights associated with the Distribution. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.rights)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.37: Documentation - A page that provides additional information about the Data Service. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.documentation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.38: Contact point - Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Data Service. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.contactpoint)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.39: Rights - A statement that specifies rights associated with the Distribution. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.rights)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.4: Linked schemas - An established schema to which the described Distribution conforms. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Distribution.linkedschemas)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.40: Serves dataset - This property refers to a collection of data that this data service can distribute. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.servesdataset)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.41: Licence - A licence under which the Data service is made available. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.licence)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.42: Endpoint description - A description of the services available via the end-points, including their operations, parameters etc. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.endpointdescription)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.43: Endpoint url - The root location or primary endpoint of the service (an IRI). (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.endpointURL)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.44: Licence - A licence under which the Data service is made available. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.licence)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.45: The applicable legislation must be set to the HVD IR ELI. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#DataService.applicablelegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.46: Email - A email address via which contact can be made. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Kind.email)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.47: Contact page - A webpage that either allows to make contact (i.e. a webform) or the information contains how to get into contact. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Kind.contactpage)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.48: Email - A email address via which contact can be made. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Kind.email)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.49: Contact page - A webpage that either allows to make contact (i.e. a webform) or the information contains how to get into contact. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Kind.contactpage)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.5: Access url - A URL that gives access to a Distribution of the Dataset. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Distribution.accessURL)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.50: Conforms to - An implementing rule or other specification. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Dataset.conformsto)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.51: Applicable legislation - The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Dataset.applicablelegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.52: Dataset distribution - An available Distribution for the Dataset. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Dataset.datasetdistribution)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.53: In series - A dataset series of which the dataset is part. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Dataset.inseries)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.54: Applicable legislation - The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Dataset. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Dataset.applicablelegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.55: Contact point - Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Dataset. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Dataset.contactpoint)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.56: In series - A dataset series of which the dataset is part. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Dataset.inseries)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.57: Hvd category - The HVD category to which this Dataset belongs. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Dataset.HVDCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.58: Hvd category - The HVD category to which this Dataset belongs. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Dataset.HVDCategory)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.59: Contact point - Contact information that can be used for sending comments about the Dataset. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Dataset.contactpoint)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.6: Applicable legislation - The legislation that mandates the creation or management of the Distribution (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Distribution.applicablelegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.60: Conforms to - An implementing rule or other specification. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Dataset.conformsto)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.61: Dataset distribution - An available Distribution for the Dataset. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Dataset.datasetdistribution)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.62: The applicable legislation must be set to the HVD IR ELI. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Dataset.applicablelegislation)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.7: Access service - A data service that gives access to the distribution of the dataset (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Distribution.accessservice)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.8: Rights - A statement that specifies rights associated with the Distribution. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Distribution.rights)
strings.dcat-ap-hvd.pattern.title.9: Access url - A URL that gives access to a Distribution of the Dataset. (https://semiceu.github.io/DCAT-AP/releases/3.0.0-hvd#Distribution.accessURL)
